headline: Co-founder and CTO building AI-native aircraft maintenance tools at Fleetcraft
title: Co-founder, CTO
confidenceNote: Primary and company-adjacent sources consistently identify Ammar Naseer as Fleetcraft co-founder/CTO; company description and funding coverage align on AI for aircraft maintenance.
bioMarkdown: Co-founder and CTO of Fleetcraft, an AI software company focused on aircraft maintenance workflows. Ammar is useful to match with attendees working on aviation, MRO operations, regulated workflow automation, applied AI, and early-stage technical company building.

primary.label: LinkedIn profile
primary.note: Lists Ammar Naseer as Co-founder, CTO at Fleetcraft and references AI in aerospace.

primary.label: Fleetcraft LinkedIn company page
primary.note: Describes Fleetcraft as AI built for aircraft maintenance and lists Ammar Naseer among employees.

primary.label: Entrepreneurs First portfolio page
primary.note: Names Ammar Naseer as CTO and describes Fleetcraft's aircraft maintenance AI tools.

secondary.label: Startup Intros company profile
secondary.note: Summarizes Fleetcraft as co-founded by CEO Finn Quinlan and CTO Ammar Naseer, with AI for aviation maintenance.

secondary.label: Entrepreneurs First LinkedIn funding post
secondary.note: Reports Fleetcraft's seed round and names Finn Quinlan as CEO and Ammar Naseer as CTO.

headline: SVP Engineering at Midi Health, scaling AI-native women's health technology
title: Senior Vice President of Engineering
location: Palo Alto / Mountain View, CA, US
confidenceNote: Anand's own LinkedIn post says he joined Midi Health as SVP Engineering; profile and secondary leadership pages align with prior engineering leadership history.
bioMarkdown: SVP Engineering at Midi Health, where he is helping scale the engineering team, clinical AI infrastructure, and health data platform for women's midlife care. Previously held senior engineering leadership roles at Everlaw, Narvar, Snap, and Twitter.

primary.label: LinkedIn profile
primary.note: Lists Anand Madhavan at Midi Health and Stanford University, located in the Mountain View area.

primary.label: LinkedIn announcement post
primary.note: Anand states he joined Midi Health as SVP of Engineering and describes the AI and care platform opportunity.

primary.label: Midi Health website
primary.note: Describes Midi as an insurance-covered virtual clinic for perimenopause and menopause care.

secondary.label: ELC speaker profile
secondary.note: Summarizes prior engineering leadership roles at Everlaw, Narvar, Snap, and Twitter.

secondary.label: The Org profile
secondary.note: Unverified org profile listing Anand as Senior Vice President of Engineering at Midi Health.

secondary.label: Midi Health Series D press release
secondary.note: Provides company context on Midi Health's scale, funding, and Palo Alto base.

headline: Partner and Applied AI Practice Leader at Deloitte Canada
title: Partner, Applied AI Practice Leader
confidenceNote: Deloitte's official profile identifies Anand Nimkar as leading Deloitte Canada's applied AI practice and serving as Chief Architect in the Canadian Office of Generative AI.
bioMarkdown: Partner at Deloitte Canada leading the applied AI practice. Anand works on AI strategy and implementation for large enterprises and public-sector organizations, including generative AI architecture, platform delivery, and AI ecosystem partnerships.

primary.note: Official Deloitte profile describing Anand as applied AI practice leader and Chief Architect for the Canadian Office of Generative AI.

secondary.note: Quotes Anand as Partner and Applied AI practice leader at Deloitte Canada on scaling agentic AI.

headline: Responsible technology and federal AI lead at REI Systems
title: AI Offering Lead
confidenceNote: Official REI Systems articles consistently identify Anand as AI Offering Lead; the supplied Senior Director title was not directly verified in primary sources, and secondary org listings vary.
bioMarkdown: AI Offering Lead at REI Systems working on federal AI adoption, governance, risk management, grants, case management, and workflow automation. Good match for attendees focused on public-sector AI, responsible technology, and government modernization.

headline: Engineering and operations leader at Manychat
title: VP of Engineering
confidenceNote: LinkedIn identifies Anastasia as VP of Engineering at Manychat and other sources reference operations leadership; the supplied COO/CTO title was not verified in accessible primary sources.
bioMarkdown: Engineering and operations leader at Manychat, a customer conversation automation platform. Her public footprint points to leadership across engineering, product operations, and scaling product teams.
